Singularity Finance - Tokenising Finance & AI for Onchain Economy

Singularity Finance PortalMerging PortalSingularity Finance is an EVM compatible Layer 2 blockchain which brings the AI economy onchain. It offers a compliant RWA tokenisation framework to tokenise AI compute and monetise AI agents.
CLAIM $1000

Founding Teams
Partner
Building the Future of AiFi
AI-Centric L2 Blockchain

This specialised EVM Layer-2 platform is optimised for monetisation of AI, addressing challenges like liquidity and accessibility by tokenising core parts of the AI value chain. From hardware to applications, it enables new asset classes, such as tokenised AI compute, integrated seamlessly with the DeFi ecosystem.

Native, yield-bearing tokenised AI assets

Singularity Finance offers unparalleled access to the rapidly expanding AI economy by tokenising its components. For individuals and businesses seeking to participate in the growth of AI technologies, the platform transforms various components of the AI value chain into native, yield-bearing tokenised AI assets onchain.

Compliant Onchain Identity

The platform integrates onchain identity management, ensuring legal and regulatory compliance (e.g., KYC/AML), which is essential for attracting institutional and corporate interest in tokenisation.

Monetising the AI Value Chain

Data Ownership

Singularity Finance provides innovative monetisation opportunities for network participants to contribute curated data to the AI economy and benefit from the yield generated through data usage.

Discover Singularity FinanceSingularity Finance is pioneering the AI-Finance (AiFi) platform, an EVM Layer 2 designed to tokenize and integrate the AI economy. Aligned with SingularityNETâ€™s vision, it combines AI, RWAs, and blockchain to enhance on-chain application performance and efficiency.
Singularity Finance dAppSingularity Finance bridges DeFi and the tokenisation of the AI economy, ushering in the era of AI-Finance (AiFi). Experience robust financial services on a secure, user-friendly platform.
Tokenisation FrameworkSingularity Finance enables the creation of fully compliant tokenised funds, ensuring security, transparency, and liquidity for investors and institutions.
Onchain Identity SolutionsThe L2 features onchain identities, enabling permissioned and permissionless products while ensuring AML compliance.
Multi-Asset Strategy VaultsThese vaults enable users to manage tokenised assets and strategies, leveraging AI-driven risk management and automated execution.
Merger Details
  • Merger announcement and litepaper release: 15 October 2024
  • SingularityDAO Governance Vote Period: 9th December 2024 (12:00 PM UTC) â€“ 13th December 2024 (12:00 PM UTC)
  • Vote Result Announcement: 14th December 2024
  • Phase 1 Migration starts: 16 January 2025

Conversion ratios: The token conversion ratios for the migration to SFI are as follows:

  • SDAO will convert to SFI at a ratio of 1:1 (1 SDAO = 1 SFI)
  • CGV will convert to SFI at a ratio of 1:0.14122 (1 CGV = 0.14122 SFI)
*Ratios are calculated based on the 200-day moving average of each token up to 26th November 2024.
